nasb.text: “It shall come about in that day,” declares the Lord, “that the heart of the king and the heart of the princes will fail; and the priests will be appalled and the prophets will be astounded.”

esv.text: “In that day, declares the Lord, courage shall fail both king and officials. The priests shall be appalled and the prophets astounded.”

cnv.text: “到那日，君王和首領的勇氣消失， 祭司也要驚惶， 先知都必詫異。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“到那天，君王和官长必丧胆，祭司和先知必惊骇。”
